Life Orb: Boosts damage by 30% but costs 10% max HP per attacking move.
Choice Band: Boosts Attack by 50% but locks into one move.
Choice Specs: Boosts Special Attack by 50% but locks into one move.
Choice Scarf: Boosts Speed by 50% but locks into one move.
Focus Sash: Survives any single hit at 1 HP when at full HP. Single use.
Assault Vest: Boosts Special Defense by 50% but prevents status moves.
Eviolite: Boosts Defense and Sp.Def by 50% for unevolved Pokémon.
Sitrus Berry: Restores 25% max HP when HP falls below 50%.
Safety Goggles: Protects from weather damage and powder moves.
Covert Cloak: Protects from secondary effects of moves.
Clear Amulet: Prevents stat reduction from other Pokémon's moves or abilities.
Scope Lens: Boosts critical hit ratio by one stage.
Rocky Helmet: Damages attacker for 1/6 max HP on contact.
Light Clay: Extends Light Screen and Reflect from 5 to 8 turns.
Throat Spray: Raises Sp.Atk by one stage after using a sound move.
Mental Herb: Cures infatuation, Taunt, Encore, Torment, Disable, and Heal Block once.
Weakness Policy: Raises Attack and Sp.Atk by 2 stages when hit by a super-effective move.
Booster Energy: Activates Protosynthesis or Quark Drive ability effect.
Adrenaline Orb: Raises Speed by one stage when Intimidated.
Electric Seed: Boosts Defense by one stage on Electric Terrain. Single use.
Grassy Seed: Boosts Defense by one stage on Grassy Terrain. Single use.
Misty Seed: Boosts Sp.Def by one stage on Misty Terrain. Single use.
Psychic Seed: Boosts Sp.Def by one stage on Psychic Terrain. Single use.
Normal Gem: Boosts the first Normal-type move by 30%. Single use.
Power Herb: Allows immediate use of charge moves (Meteor Beam, Solar Beam, etc.). Single use.
Ability Shield: Prevents the holder's ability from being changed or suppressed.
Black Sludge: Restores 1/16 HP per turn for Poison types; damages non-Poison types.
Flame Orb: Burns the holder at end of turn. Activates Guts, Flare Boost, etc.
Toxic Orb: Badly poisons the holder at end of turn. Activates Poison Heal, etc.
Aguav Berry: Restores 33% max HP when HP falls below 25%.
Eject Pack: Forces the holder to switch out when any of its stats are lowered. Single use.
Eject Button: Forces the holder to switch out when hit by an attack. Single use.
Room Service: Lowers Speed by one stage when Trick Room is set. Single use.
Lagging Tail: Forces the holder to move last in its priority bracket.
Iron Ball: Halves Speed and grounds Flying-type holders. Removes Ground immunity.
BrightPowder: Lowers opponents' accuracy by casting a tricky glare.
Focus Band: May let the holder endure a knockout hit at 1 HP (10% chance).
King's Rock: May cause the target to flinch when the holder lands a hit.
Quick Claw: Occasionally lets the holder move first in its priority bracket.
Shell Bell: Restores 1/8 of the damage dealt to the opponent as HP.
Aspear Berry: Cures the holder's freeze status once.
Leppa Berry: Restores 10 PP to a depleted move once.
Oran Berry: Restores 10 HP when HP is low.
Charizardite X: Mega Evolves Charizard into Mega Charizard X.
Charizardite Y: Mega Evolves Charizard into Mega Charizard Y.
Absolite Z: Mega Evolves Absol into Mega Absol Z.
Garchompite Z: Mega Evolves Garchomp into Mega Garchomp Z.
Lucarionite Z: Mega Evolves Lucario into Mega Lucario Z.
Raichunite X: Mega Evolves Raichu into Mega Raichu X.
Raichunite Y: Mega Evolves Raichu into Mega Raichu Y.
Kommonium Z: Allows Kommo-o to use Clangorous Soulblaze.
